languages.text: "Я не понимаю, о чем ты говоришь, посетитель. Здесь нет ничего, что принадлежит тебе или твоему {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империуму{/g}, и это нерушимая истина". {n}Навершие посоха Смотрителя направлено прямо вам в грудь, наливаясь угрожающим свечением.{/n} "Любые попытки оспорить ее приведут к твоей аннигиляции".

traits.locale_text: "Я не понимаю, о чем ты говоришь, посетитель. Это лишь одно из незавершенных творений владыки, и оно не предназначено для чужих глаз! Здесь нет ничего, что принадлежит тебе или {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империуму{/g}, и это неоспоримая истина. Не прикасайся к экспонатам даже кончиками своих грязных пальцев, иначе горько об этом пожалеешь". {n}Навершие посоха Смотрителя направлено прямо вам в грудь, наливаясь угрожающим свечением.{/n}

languages.text: "I do not know of what you speak, visitor. There is nothing here that belongs to you or your {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, and that is an inviolable truth." {n}The tip of the Warden's staff points straight at your chest, casting a menacing glow.{/n} "Any attempts to dispute this truth will result in your annihilation."
languages.original_text: "Я не понимаю, о чем ты говоришь, посетитель. Здесь нет ничего, что принадлежит тебе или твоему {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империуму{/g}, и это нерушимая истина". {n}Навершие посоха Смотрителя направлено прямо вам в грудь, наливаясь угрожающим свечением.{/n} "Любые попытки оспорить ее приведут к твоей аннигиляции".

traits.locale_text: "I do not know of what you speak, visitor. There is nothing here that belongs to you or your {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, and that is the incontrovertible truth." {n}The tip of the Warden's staff points straight at your chest, casting a menacing glow.{/n} "Any attempts to dispute this truth will result in your annihilation."

"I do not know of what you speak, visitor. There is nothing here that belongs to you or your {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, and that is an inviolable truth." {n}The tip of the Warden's staff points straight at your chest, casting a menacing glow.{/n} "Any attempts to dispute this truth will result in your annihilation."

"I do not know of what you speak, visitor. This is only one of the overlord's unfinished creations, and it is not meant for any eyes but his! There is nothing here that belongs to you or the Imperium, and that is the incontrovertible truth. Do not touch the exhibits, not even with your dirty fingertips, or you will regret it most bitterly." {n}The tip of the Warden's staff points straight at your chest, casting a menacing glow.{/n}

"I do not know of what you speak, visitor. There is nothing here that belongs to you or your {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, and that is the incontrovertible truth." {n}The tip of the Warden's staff points straight at your chest, casting a menacing glow.{/n} "Any attempts to dispute this truth will result in your annihilation."

"I do not know of what you speak, visitor. There is nothing here that belongs to you or your {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, and that is an inviolable truth." {n}The tip of the Warden's staff points straight at your chest, casting a menacing glow.{/n} "Any attempts to dispute this truth will result in your annihilation."

languages.text: 「あなたが話していることは知りません、訪問者。これは主の未完成の作品の一つに過ぎず、あなたの目などには見せられません！ここに展示されているものは、あなたや帝国のものなどありません。それは明白な真実です。展示品に触るな、汚れた指先でさえ触るな。そうしなければ、深く後悔するだろう。」{n}ウォーデンが杖の先をあなたの胸に突きつけ、不吉な光を放つ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not know of what you speak, visitor. This is only one of the overlord's unfinished creations, and it is not meant for any eyes but his! There is nothing here that belongs to you or the Imperium, and that is the incontrovertible truth. Do not touch the exhibits, not even with your dirty fingertips, or you will regret it most bitterly." {n}The tip of the Warden's staff points straight at your chest, casting a menacing glow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが話していることは知りません、訪問者。これは主の未完成の作品の一つに過ぎず、あなたの目などには見せられません！ここに展示されているものは、あなたや帝国のものなどありません。それは明白な真実です。展示品に触るな、汚れた指先でさえ触るな。そうしなければ、深く後悔するだろう。」{n}ウォーデンが杖の先をあなたの胸に突きつけ、不吉な光を放つ。{/n}

languages.text: «No sé de qué hablas, visitante. Aquí no hay nada que os pertenezca ni a ti ni a tu {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, y esa es una verdad absoluta». {n}La punta del bastón del guardián apunta a tu pecho con brillo amenazador.{/n} «Cualquier intento de disputar este hecho conllevará tu aniquilación».
languages.original_text: "I do not know of what you speak, visitor. There is nothing here that belongs to you or your {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, and that is an inviolable truth." {n}The tip of the Warden's staff points straight at your chest, casting a menacing glow.{/n} "Any attempts to dispute this truth will result in your annihilation."

traits.locale_text: «No sé de qué hablas, visitante. Aquí no hay nada que os pertenezca ni a ti ni a tu {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, y esa es una verdad absoluta». {n}La punta del bastón del guardián apunta a tu pecho con brillo amenazador.{/n} «Cualquier intento de disputar este hecho conllevará tu aniquilación».

languages.text: “我不明白你在说些什么，访客。此处没有任何东西属于你，或是你的{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}。这是不容置疑的事实。”{n}看守者的权杖直指你的胸口，散发出威胁性的光芒。{/n}“任何试图否认这一事实的举动，都将导致你的湮灭。”
languages.original_text: "I do not know of what you speak, visitor. There is nothing here that belongs to you or your {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, and that is an inviolable truth." {n}The tip of the Warden's staff points straight at your chest, casting a menacing glow.{/n} "Any attempts to dispute this truth will result in your annihilation."

traits.locale_text: “我不明白你在说些什么，访客。此处没有任何东西属于你，或是你的{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}。这是不容置疑的事实。”{n}看守者的权杖直指你的胸口，散发出威胁性的光芒。{/n}“任何试图否认这一事实的举动，都将导致你的湮灭。”

languages.text: "Ich weiß nicht, wovon Ihr sprecht, {mf|Besucher|Besucherin}. Hier gibt es nichts, was Euch oder Eurem {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} gehört, das ist eine unantastbare Wahrheit." {n}Der Wächter richtet die Spitze seines Stabes auf deine Brust und funkelt dich bedrohlich an.{/n} "Jeder Versuch, diese Wahrheit zu bestreiten führt zu Euer Auslöschung."
languages.original_text: "I do not know of what you speak, visitor. There is nothing here that belongs to you or your {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, and that is an inviolable truth." {n}The tip of the Warden's staff points straight at your chest, casting a menacing glow.{/n} "Any attempts to dispute this truth will result in your annihilation."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß nicht, wovon Ihr sprecht, {mf|Besucher|Besucherin}. Hier gibt es nichts, was Euch oder Eurem {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} gehört, das ist eine unantastbare Wahrheit." {n}Der Wächter richtet die Spitze seines Stabes auf deine Brust und funkelt dich bedrohlich an.{/n} "Jeder Versuch, diese Wahrheit zu bestreiten führt zu Euer Auslöschung."

languages.text: "Neden bahsettiğini bilmiyorum ziyaretçi. Burada sana veya {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk'una{/g} ait hiçbir şey yok. Bu, ihlal edilemez bir gerçektir." {n}Muhafız'ın asasının ucu, doğrudan göğsüne doğrultulup tehditkâr bir parıltı yayıyor.{/n} "Bu gerçeğe itiraz etmeye yönelik her türlü girişim, yok oluşunla sonuçlanacaktır."
languages.original_text: "I do not know of what you speak, visitor. There is nothing here that belongs to you or your {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, and that is an inviolable truth." {n}The tip of the Warden's staff points straight at your chest, casting a menacing glow.{/n} "Any attempts to dispute this truth will result in your annihilation."

traits.locale_text: "Neden bahsettiğini bilmiyorum ziyaretçi. Burada sana veya {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk'una{/g} ait hiçbir şey yok. Bu, ihlal edilemez bir gerçektir." {n}Muhafız'ın asasının ucu, doğrudan göğsüne doğrultulup tehditkâr bir parıltı yayıyor.{/n} "Bu gerçeğe itiraz etmeye yönelik her türlü girişim, yok oluşunla sonuçlanacaktır."

languages.text: « J'ignore de quoi vous parlez, {mf|visiteur|visiteuse}. Rien ici ne vous appartient, ni à vous ni à votre {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, et c'est là une vérité incontestable. »{n}Pour appuyer sa menace, le gardien pointe l'extrémité de son bâton vers votre poitrine.{/n} « Toute tentative de réfuter cette vérité se soldera par votre annihilation. »
languages.original_text: "I do not know of what you speak, visitor. There is nothing here that belongs to you or your {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, and that is an inviolable truth." {n}The tip of the Warden's staff points straight at your chest, casting a menacing glow.{/n} "Any attempts to dispute this truth will result in your annihilation."
